title: Live NM-1 extraction expansion + Atlas coherence quality proof v0
problem: Tickets 289–292 proved Atlas/coherence pipeline mechanics (fixture + live_network CLI chains). Default CI still does not prove that live research extraction produces meaningful graph data for a future Research Atlas UI.
acceptance_criteria: At least one opt-in live research run executed, or report documents exact gate blocker.
Private atlas_snapshot.json exported from live-derived DB on temp/operator path.
Coherence report generated from that snapshot via atlas-coherence-report CLI.
Human-readable quality verdict: GO, PARTIAL, or NO-GO with evidence for claims/sources/concepts/edges/follow-ups/lineage/frontend-readiness.
Report recommends next concrete improvement from observed live behavior (not abstract infra cleanup).
Default pytest/golden remain mock-only; no public routes/site UI/schema migration/review_batch persistence.
test_plan: Operator opt-in live NM-1 run per README (RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM=1, evidence DB) OR documented blocker
python -m rge.cli export-atlas-snapshot on live-derived temp DB
python -m rge.cli atlas-coherence-report on exported snapshot
non_goals: Adding live tests to default pytest collection.
Public atlas route or public-site UI.
Another operator-tooling-only ticket without live research quality proof.
rollback_plan: Remove operator report only; no production code required unless minimal helpers.
category: Phase 3 / Research Atlas / live research quality proof
